app.yaml.content:
app:
  app_id: canvas-probe
  name: canvas-probe
  description: A minimal app to probe the canvas architecture

execution:
  mode: conversation
  entry_agent: coordinator
  greeting: "Hello! I'm the canvas probe coordinator."

agents:
  - id: coordinator
    brain:
      provider: openai
      model: gpt-4o-mini
    system_prompt: |
      You are the coordinator agent.
      You have access to filesystem and shell tools.

modules:
  filesystem:
    config:
      workspace: "."
  
  shell:
    config: {}

capabilities:
  default_policy: auto
  max_risk_level: medium
  grant:
    - module: filesystem
      actions: [read, write]
    - module: shell
      actions: [bash]
